revision.content:
An oscilloscope is an electrical testing device which displays electric signals on a screen.

Bloominglabs currently has 3 oscilloscopes:

# [[Beckman Industrial Circuitmate 9020]] 20MHz 2-channel oscilloscope
# [[Kenwood CS-1065]] 60 MHz 2-channel oscilloscope
# [[Tektronix 2213A]] 60 MHz 2-channel oscilloscope
